programme.desc: 'S11/E7 - Lynn Hajny & Tommy Douyette'. The death of a wealthy businessman exposes a bizarre murder conspiracy.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: 'S11/E8 - Sherry Engel & Timmy Rogers'. A woman's friendship with a younger man falls under suspicion when her husband is brutally murdered.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Walking On The Wild Side'. When a savvy salon owner falls hard for a handsome bad boy, she decides to take a walk on the wild side and agrees to help him start an escort service to make extra cash.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Surinder Koli'. Surinder Koli killed numerous people before eating his victims' body parts. Featuring an exclusive interview with the psychologist who spent hours assessing the so-called Slumdog Cannibal.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S20/E1 - The McGuire Diaries'. Chilling video diaries capture the intimate moments of Melanie McGuire, a woman known as a caring wife, mother and nurse, who stands trial for the gruesome murder of her husband.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - An Eye For Murder'. An investigation into the killer who murdered three women and surgically removed their eyes.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Moments Of Murder'. A look at the Los Angeles serial killer who had a penchant for torturing his model victims and taking their last-ever picture.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Killer Surgeon'. An arrogant cosmetic surgeon operating out of a basement permanently scars and kills patients, then shocks detectives by attempting to murder a loved one.

programme.title: Homicide For The Holidays
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Murder Under The Mistletoe'. When a young mother is brutally murdered during the Christmas holiday, investigators uncover a love triangle that shocks her tightknit family and forever robs them of their holiday cheer.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Deadly Consequences'. A beautiful fashionista is swept off her feet when she meets a man who promises the world. But, their lavish lifestyle proves too good to be true when she learns his dark secret.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S20/E2 - An Eye For An Eye'. Brian Stidham was a family man and a talented eye surgeon whose career was taking off until his promising life was cut short in 2004, when he was found murdered in a parking lot.

programme.desc: 'S11/E9 - Tia Skinner & Jonathan Kurtz'. Desperate teen lovers trigger a deadly chain of events.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Deadly Practice'. A radical underground practitioner with no medical experience promises a miracle cure online, and his victims receive dangerous procedures in an unsanitary trailer.

programme.title: Doug To The Rescue
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Dixie Fire Foxes'. After the Dixie Fire devastates the town of Greenville, Doug heads in with his old friend, Shannon, to rescue the lost cats and wild animals that have been left behind.

programme.title: Time Flies
programme.desc: We like to think we can control everything: changing the course of water, reclaiming land, replanting deserts.

programme.title: Innocent Behind Bars
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Derrick Jamison - 20 Years on Death Row'. Derrick Jamison was convicted for murder, and sentenced to death. He languished on death row, desperate to prove his innocence as he faced execution six times.

programme.title: A History Of Christianity
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Orthodoxy: From Empire to Empire'. Christianity is traditionally split into Catholicism and Protestantism, but Eastern Orthodox Christianity flourishes in Russia and the Balkans.

programme.title: Titans: The Rise of Wall Street

programme.title: Titans: The Rise of Wall Street

programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - And Then There Were None'. The battle over the food supply pushes Adam, Evan, Christine and Gerrid to the limit. Andrew and Jennifer are abandoned at base camp.

programme.desc: 'S11/E1 - He Might Die'. Otto is trampled by a cow during a severe snowstorm and must be rescued before he succumbs to his life-threatening injuries.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Saving Ayati, The Crevice'. Ayati falls over. Mazu must come up with an idea to help. A crevice rips through the ground and traps four little dinos in Giganto's path.

programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Timid Bill and brave Rocky end up stranded on an island, however Rocky suddenly becomes the scared one! Trey warns the little dinos about a cave monster named Shriekasaurus.

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - The Pool'. A trip to the pool's great fun, until Dad forgets the towels, lunch and everything else!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - The Magic Mansion'. Funny takes the friends somewhere they can have superpowers! Mickey's hero, Rocket Mouse, invites Mickey and friends to join his team of mouse-stronauts on a great adventure!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Fifty-foot Pluto!'. Franken-Pete's batteries run down just before he's supposed to host the Musical Monster Show! Minnie asks Mickey to learn ice dancing with her, but Mickey is nervous.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - A Big Giant Problem!'. Mickey, and friends travel to Cloud Kingdom to see if Willie the Giant knows why it hasn't rained. On Razzle Dazzle Day, Donald makes a wish with a genie to win all the prizes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E19'. At the Festival of Heroes, Mickey, Minnie, and friends learn that Pete the Mighty is really mighty fearful of a lot. Wanda Warbler gets a mysterious invitation to adventure!

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Parade Panic / the Case of the Burgling Book Bandit'. Team Spidey are the main attraction at a big parade thrown in their honor. When all the detective books in the library go missing, Team Spidey is on the case!

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Follow the Sledder/Stinkpod Day'. When Eureka invents a vehicle to help her friends get to school faster, Bog doesn't like the change. Eureka is determined to find a use for 'stinkpods'.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Cookie's Day Off / Picture Furfect'. When Cookie's beach trip is cancelled due to weather, Alice brings the beach to her! Fergie's upset he couldn't stay pristine for his family picture so Alice cheers him up.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Franken-Pete needs help getting ready for the Pumpkin Carving Contest, but when Pluto helps, he accidentally gets zapped to giant size! Mickey accidentally breaks Minnie's kite.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Sleepover Stakeout/ Rescue Club'. Jayden plans a sleepover stakeout to catch the thief of his new invention. Carly wants to join the school's Rescue Club, even though she's not a rescue vehicle like the Firebuds.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E119 - Phones'. Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurant with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E120 - Pavlova'. The kids play Café so Bingo can eat Pavlova, but Dad the chef never seems to get the order quite right! When Bluey fires him, Dad sets up his own competing shop next door.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E122 - Pizza Girls'. Bluey and Bingo are making mud pizzas and delivering them to the grownups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E123 - Driving'. With only five minutes to play 'Driving,' Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E126 - Faceytalk'. Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the 80s and about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E127 - Ragdoll'. Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy ice cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Gallymoggers Granola / Sour Grapes'. When Hattie disappears from overeating granola, Alice must bring him back! Rosa attends her first Great Grape Picnic, where she tries new foods with Alice and friends' help.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E61 - Sleepytime'. As Mum finishes reading bedtime stories to Bingo and kisses her goodnight, Bingo tells Mum tomorrow morning she will be waking up in her own bed.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E62 - Rug Island'. Bluey and Bingo are living on a desert island in the back garden when they discover Dad washed up on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E64 - Sticky Gecko'. Bluey and Bingo won't leave for their playdate with Judo until a sticky rubber gecko falls down from the ceiling!

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Sleepover Stakeout/ Rescue Club'. Jayden plans a sleepover stakeout to catch the thief of his new invention. Carly wants to join the school's Rescue Club, even though she's not a rescue vehicle like the Firebuds.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E130 - Heroes of the Road Part Iii/ Heroes of the Road Part 4'. The PJMs can't wait to use their vehicles against Carly and Cartoka. But they don't work well with Newton.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Order Up! / Teeny-tiny Venture'. Hattie and Fergie use teacup carts to deliver bakery orders while getting into friendly competition. Alice and Rosa shrink before Rosa's Knighting Ceremony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S3/E79'. The Pugs are on a mission to recreate a video of a panda sneezing in China. Lollie enlists the Pugs to fetch some oranges for Ana's daily orange juice.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S3/E80 - Anchors Away'. Bingo and Rolly help ARF find the perfect robot sibling. When the Pugs' collars accidentally get mailed to Bonnie in Africa, they have to get them back!

programme.title: How Stella Got Her Groove Back

programme.title: Brick Mansions
programme.desc: An undercover Detroit cop navigates a dangerous neighbourhood with the help of an ex-con in order to bring down a crime lord and his plot to devastate the entire city.

programme.title: On The Streets Of LA
programme.desc: An estranged father and son are paroled from the same maximum-security prison with one unusual condition, they must become roommates.

programme.title: Traitor
programme.desc: When straight-arrow agent Roy Clayton assumes command of a special FBI task force, he becomes entangled in a web of covert operations.

programme.title: Enter The Fire
programme.desc: Jake Bolt seeks refuge with his estranged foster brother. As the mafia hunts him down, the two brothers must battle for their lives, while trying not to kill each other in the process.

programme.title: Phenomenon
programme.desc: An ordinary man sees a bright light descend from the sky, and discovers he now has super-intelligence and telekinesis.

programme.title: Johnson Family Vacation
programme.desc: A misfit family tries to survive outrageous obstacles (including each other) on a cross-country trek to their annual family reunion.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: A troubled young man enlists in the coast guard, where he's taken in by a renowned rescue swimmer who's hardened by the loss of his team from an accident years back.

programme.title: Gods Of Egypt
programme.desc: Mortal hero Bek teams with the god Horus in an alliance against Set, who has usurped Egypt's throne, plunging the once peaceful and prosperous empire into chaos and conflict.

programme.title: Americano
programme.desc: While backpacking through Europe with his best friend Chris McKinley meets a Spanish beauty Adela and an enigmatic provocateur Riccardo, during ''The Running of the Bulls''.

programme.title: Living & Dying
programme.desc: Four robbers find themselves in a gunfight with the police. One dead and one wounded, the remaining trio takes refuge in a British pub.

programme.desc: An NYPD Detective and his struggle for justice, while taking care of his late partner's three little girls after he is killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life

programme.title: Surrogates

programme.title: Música
programme.desc: Musica transports viewers into the world of music. Focusing mainly on the European musical scene, each show concentrate on one specific topic, artist portrait, work or event.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Michael Palin revisits his groundbreaking travel series', and fans, including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley, reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E11'. In the Philippines, the Taal volcano violently erupts, blasting ash and spewing debris over nearby towns and villages. In Queensland, Australia, a freak hail storm unleashes a destructive assault on residents.

programme.title: Spectacular Earth
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Megawave'. Nazaré in Portugal is the site of the biggest ocean waves ever recorded on Earth. To understand what creates these monsters, plunge beneath the waves to reveal the sprawling landscapes of the seabed.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Canada: Freedom Cove'. Ben heads to the azure seas and pine-covered mountains of Canada, where artistic couple Catherine and Wayne live on a floating island they built themselves.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - To Close For Comfort'. Kim and Pierre turn their attentions to harvesting big game, Mike returns home to discover a cabin in much need of repair, Now in Lutsel K'e, Becky tries to sort out her 'green' team of sled dogs.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Tokyo Skytree'. Revealing how the Tokyo Skytree was constructed, the world's tallest free-standing tower that uses liquid springs and safety glass to withstand earthquakes and high winds.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Michael Palin revisits his groundbreaking travel series', and fans, including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley, reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Canada: Freedom Cove'. Ben heads to the azure seas and pine-covered mountains of Canada, where artistic couple Catherine and Wayne live on a floating island they built themselves.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Discover how engineers bent two Manhattan skyscrapers and then connected them with a sky bridge 700 feet in the air.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. How can a glass dome be built big enough to house a mountain? What happens when a major railway station is completely taken apart and rebuilt - during the rush hour?

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. We visit an extraordinary bridge that spans a vast valley and becomes the tallest in the world, and a luxury hotel was built upside down in an abandoned quarry in China.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Michael Palin revisits his groundbreaking travel series', and fans, including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley, reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Scotland'. Ben Fogle returns to meet his previous contributors who set up home in remote locations. In this episode, he returns to Scotland to see the Goddard family who live off-grid.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E18 - Beware the Wild'. Sue builds a drainage system under her runway. Ricko explores old family land. Jessie sets up camp in Brushkana. The Hailstones go boating.

programme.title: Fearless 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Rob Delaney'. Comedian Rob Delaney joins former Special Forces operative Jason Fox in rural Wales, to take on three daring challenges, including a jump off a 40-metre viaduct.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Crossrail'. This episode looks at the creation of London's Crossrail network, revealing how taxidermy inspired an engineering breakthrough.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Australia'. Ben learns to oyster pick, brew beer, trade fish and dance with the locals with voluntary castaway Dave Glasheen on a remote Australian island.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E19 - The New World'. Sue travels to the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge. Ricko hunts moose. Jessie builds a cabin in Brushkana. The Hailstones all gather in Kiwalik.

programme.title: Fearless 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Maya Jama'. Jason Fox - Foxy from SAS: Who Dares Wins - takes Maya Jama out of her comfort zone for scary physical challenges and some heart-to-heart chat.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Delta'. Sue visits the beautiful mangroves of the Sundarbans, home of the Bengal tiger, and meets the villagers who live in fear of an attack.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Green Seas'. From enchanted kelp forests to undersea prairies, the planet's green seas teem with life. They are the most abundant but fiercely competitive places in the ocean to live.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Michael Palin recalls his travels to the Himalaya mountain range in 2004, and his travels into Tibet where he reaches Everest Base Camp.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Tokyo Skytree'. Revealing how the Tokyo Skytree was constructed, the world's tallest free-standing tower that uses liquid springs and safety glass to withstand earthquakes and high winds.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Martin explores French Polynesia through French baguettes and coral wine, and on a Polynesian outrigger canoe. He swims with sharks, investigates Marlon Brando's wildlife programme.

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Comedian and travel enthusiast Griff Rhys Jones continues his journey Down Under. On the Spirit of the Outback, travelling to Queensland's west, Griff seeks to uncover what makes 'the good life'.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Down to the Wire'. Bentley goes hunting, determined to find meat for his family, Kim and Pierre set their sights on beaver, an essential source of bait they need for the winter trapping season.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Michael Palin recalls his travels to the Himalaya mountain range in 2004, and his travels into Tibet where he reaches Everest Base Camp.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Michael Palin recalls his travels to the Himalaya mountain range in 2004, and his travels into Tibet where he reaches Everest Base Camp.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Martin explores French Polynesia through French baguettes and coral wine, and on a Polynesian outrigger canoe. He swims with sharks, investigates Marlon Brando's wildlife programme.

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Comedian and travel enthusiast Griff Rhys Jones continues his journey Down Under. On the Spirit of the Outback, travelling to Queensland's west, Griff seeks to uncover what makes 'the good life'.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Egypt'. Ben journeys to North Africa to live with American widow Maryanne on the farm she's built on the edge of the Sahara. He discovers why she swapped her city abode for a simpler and tougher way of life.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Down to the Wire'. Bentley goes hunting, determined to find meat for his family, Kim and Pierre set their sights on beaver, an essential source of bait they need for the winter trapping season.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Halley VI Research Station'. We looksat the fully relocatable polar research station in Antarctica called Halley VI, which was inspired by a revolutionary icebreaking ship and ingenious designs for pre-fabricated buildings.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Bear's Wild Adventure
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Bear will be joined by World Rugby Hall of Famer Jonny Wilkinson. Wilkinson is a highly regarded former rugby union player. He won 91 caps for England and was an indispensable part of the England national team.

programme.title: Bear's Wild Adventure
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Former professional boxer Nicola Adams joins Bear. She was the first amateur female boxer to become an Olympic champion at the London 2012 Olympics, and went on to win gold a second time at Rio 2016.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E15 - Domino Effect'. Sue cleans up her river and goes fishing. Andy and Denise repair a Jeep. Jessie falls trees and prepares wood. The Hailstones build a trapping cabin.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E16 - Bear Scare'. Sue repurposes a snow melter. Ricko repairs his cabin. Jessie builds a new dock. The Hailstones go beachcombing.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E17 - New Country'. Sue is out to hunt caribou. Ricko travels to a natural hot spring. Jessie moves to Brushkana. The Hailstones build a wall tent and go fishing.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E18 - Beware the Wild'. Sue builds a drainage system under her runway. Ricko explores old family land. Jessie sets up camp in Brushkana. The Hailstones go boating.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E19 - The New World'. Sue travels to the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge. Ricko hunts moose. Jessie builds a cabin in Brushkana. The Hailstones all gather in Kiwalik.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E10'. Ben travels to Northumberland where he meets Kezz and Nathalie Petronelli-Stone. Their off-grid and environmentally sensitive approach to life means they don't even have a telly.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Deep'. A ground-breaking journey to the Deep, our final frontier and home to real-life aliens, from monstrous sharks to shrimps in glass cages and perhaps the origin of all life on Earth.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Coral Reefs'. Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the seas of the tropics. They are complex structures where there is fierce rivalry for space, but the reef is also a place full of opportunity.

programme.title: Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The...
programme.desc: 'Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The Marsh Pride. S1/E1'. The Marsh Pride of lions have lived for generations in Kenya's famous Maasai Mara Reserve. The pride's history is a tale of shifting loyalties, bloody take overs and sheer resilience.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E1 - Protect And Restore Nature'. Prince William is joined by Sir David Attenborough, a member of his Earthshot Prize Council, to explore how we may best protect and restore nature.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Mount Etna, Europe's most active volcano, is in the experiencing its longest spate of eruptions in recent years. Our story starts almost a year earlier, long before the eruptions reach full force.

programme.title: Coast Australia
programme.desc: 'S4/E3'. Exploring the history, geography and marine life of the Australia's stunning coastline.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Martin explores French Polynesia through French baguettes and coral wine, and on a Polynesian outrigger canoe. He swims with sharks, investigates Marlon Brando's wildlife programme.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Cold Harvest'. Jon and his brother Lee search a vast expanse of tundra - on the hunt for a herd of muskox, Kim and Pierre head deep into the bush in an all-out effort to expand their Yukon trapline.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E11'. In the Philippines, the Taal volcano violently erupts, blasting ash and spewing debris over nearby towns and villages. In Queensland, Australia, a freak hail storm unleashes a destructive assault on residents.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E1 - Protect And Restore Nature'. Prince William is joined by Sir David Attenborough, a member of his Earthshot Prize Council, to explore how we may best protect and restore nature.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Mount Etna, Europe's most active volcano, is in the experiencing its longest spate of eruptions in recent years. Our story starts almost a year earlier, long before the eruptions reach full force.

programme.title: Chopped Next Gen
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - From Prodigy to Pro'. The competition has a spicy start with guajillo chiles and nitro coffee. In the final round, the remaining chefs must transform bibimbap into a tasty dessert.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S22/E4 - Arizona All-Stars'. Guy is on a flavour-filled tour of sunny Arizona. First, the real deal Italian market making an authentic beef specialty straight from the mother country.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Gingerbread Gremlins Attack'. The three finalists make gingerbread showpieces to mark the 35th anniversary of the Christmas movie Gremlins. Who will win the $25,000 prize?

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Santa's Christmas Eve'. The remaining baking teams and their ice sculptors create the ultimate night before Christmas cake display featuring Santa Claus, for the $25,000 prize.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S47/E11 - Beat Bobby Flay Battle 4'. In the first round, the chefs make appetisers using pizza bites and caviar. The dessert round features a sugary cereal and a gelatinous stumper.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S5/E17 - Osaka'. From Brussels' delicious Belgian chocolate to Naples' famous pizza, Chef Andrew Zimmern explores the delectable and iconic foods that define a location.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E3 - 16-Min Meals: Cowboy Favorites'. Ree shares yummy 16-minute recipes for cowboys and cowgirls. She makes steak medallions and potatoes, and gnocchi with chorizo and corn.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E4 - 3 Apps And A Cocktail'. Ree prepares for cocktail hour with delicious dishes. They include BBQ shrimp cocktail, buffalo chicken meatball skewers and blueberry-basil limeade.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Big Game'. Molly Yeh makes a pre-game lunch for friends, and it's full of delicious finger foods! She serves her Asian Scotch eggs and crispy oven fries with feta red pepper dip.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S10/E8 - Yukon Gold Rush Trail'. Andrew chows down on Yukon trail delicacies, including beaver tail and caribou tongue.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S25/E6 - So Much Shade'. Scott Conant and Vivica A. Fox pick the competitor to take on Bobby Flay. Will it be the French master or the Caribbean cuisine enthusiast?

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Superhero Grand Finale'. In the final, the last three bakers have to create an original superhero cake and explain their powers. Who will win and take home the $25,000 prize money?

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E2 - A Big Mess in Texas'. Robert Irvine travels to Joshua, TX, to save a failing Tex-Mex restaurant with subpar food and a strained relationship between the owners.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S24/E13 - Great Gear'. Guy is in California to visit a multi-generational Italian deli that makes ravioli with a century old machine. In San Francisco, he samples lamb and pork biscuits.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S47/E2 - Beat The Judge: Scott'. Three champions set out to take down judge Scott Conant. The first-round basket contains canned shrimp, popcorn gelato and mortadella.

programme.title: Kids Sweets Showdown
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Snow Day Doughnuts'. The kid baking teams go nuts with doughnut snow creatures! In the challenges, they must create cereal treat homes for their creatures.

programme.title: Kids Sweets Showdown
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Santa Express'. Kid baking teams are tasked with making and decorating holiday train cakes. In one challenge, they must turn cookie stacks into decorative holiday trees.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E3 - Cheesier'. Host and legendary chef Guy Fieri sends four talented chefs running through the aisles in a high-stakes, high skills, grocery store cooking competition.

programme.title: Halloween Wars
programme.desc: 'S11/E7 - Dueling Monsters'. The final two teams go head-to-head for the $25,000 prize. They craft cakes that show what happens when two monsters square off in a duel.

programme.title: Chopped Next Gen
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - From Prodigy to Pro'. The competition has a spicy start with guajillo chiles and nitro coffee. In the final round, the remaining chefs must transform bibimbap into a tasty dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S31/E2 - Spice It Up'. Ree Drummond adds variety and spice to some family favourites. She makes spicy garlic bread sloppy Joes and spicy ginger sundaes with five-spice crisps.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S31/E1 - First Anniversary'. Ree Drummond celebrates Alex and Mauricio's first wedding anniversary by cooking recipes inspired by their honeymoon in the Maldives.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S22/E5 - Roadtrippin''. This trip, Guy goes from coast to coast. In New Jersey, he tries crab-stuffed flounder before heading West for pizza in Arizona and grilled chicken in California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S24/E13 - Great Gear'. Guy is in California to visit a multi-generational Italian deli that makes ravioli with a century old machine. In San Francisco, he samples lamb and pork biscuits.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E3 - Cheesier'. Host and legendary chef Guy Fieri sends four talented chefs running through the aisles in a high-stakes, high skills, grocery store cooking competition.

programme.title: Kids Sweets Showdown
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Snow Day Doughnuts'. The kid baking teams go nuts with doughnut snow creatures! In the challenges, they must create cereal treat homes for their creatures.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S47/E12 - Beat Bobby Flay: Finale Fight'. The last champ in the tournament cooks their signature dish against Bobby to score $50,000. In round one, a pork product goes through a grinder.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E3 - Cheesier'. Host and legendary chef Guy Fieri sends four talented chefs running through the aisles in a high-stakes, high skills, grocery store cooking competition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S5/E18 - Hanoi'. From Brussels' delicious Belgian chocolate to Naples' famous pizza, Chef Andrew Zimmern explores the delectable and iconic foods that define a location.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S7/E6 - Fondue Party'. Molly Yeh makes snowshoeing snacks! They include pistachio white chocolates, and beef and rutabaga pies with jalapeno ketchup. And, she throws a gruyere fondue party!

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S7/E7 - Fun Italian Feast'. Molly Yeh's makes an Italian feast for the family. It includes smashed meatball burgers, an antipasto salad, crispy parmesan friend onion, and spumoni cake jars.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S7/E10 - The Yeh-Hagen Family Games'. Molly starts the Yeh-Hagen Family Games with a delicious bang! She makes tacos, Mexican street corn-loaded tots, and coconut mango pops for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S7/E11 - Shabbat Dinner Then Breakfast'. Molly celebrates Shabbat with a delicious dinner. She makes orange juice challah, shawarma stuffed peppers and gingersnap coconut icebox cake.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S7/E12 - Mecca Of The Midwest'. Molly prepares a Midwest meal in honour of her hometown, Chicago. She makes a deep-dish pizza, Chicago corn dog bites, and caramel and cheddar popcorn mix.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S7/E13 - Purim Party'. It's Purim, and Molly's menu includes short rib gnocchi, red wine slushies, and poppy seed hamantaschen. Plus, there's a breakfast of cheesy spinach matzo brei.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E1 - Midwest Passover'. Molly Yeh celebrates Passover on the farm. She makes crispy giant skillet latke for lunch and a succulent spatchcock roast chicken with potatoes for dinner.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E2 - Cinco de Mayo Brunch Club'. It's Cinco de Mayo, and Molly celebrates, Brunch Club style! She makes Mexican chocolate babka, spicy chorizo breakfast burrito bowls and avocado salad.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Canine Christmas'. Three bakers are challenged to make gingerbread showpieces that tell quite a 'tail.' And, they create holiday treats to prove the bite is as big as their bark.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Santa's Day Off'. Three bakers use their own specialities to make gingerbread showpieces that depict Santa enjoying a much-needed day off. Which competitor will make it to the final?

programme.title: Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked...
programme.desc: 'Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked And Barbecued'. Guy Fieri visits a San Diego diner where law enforcement hones their skills. Then, in Phoenix, a Triple D legend serves up a Mexican-Asian mashup that has never been matched.

programme.title: Triple D Nation: Fried And Smoked
programme.desc: Outside San Antonio, Guy Fieri has his mind blown by some fried food. Next, things are smoking with an appetizer made with smoked fish and in Des Moines, a smoked duck special.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E9 - Big Food, Small Towns'. Guy Fieri visits small towns with big food! He checks out a butchery cranking out corn dogs and a 1700s inn-turned-gastropub serving a spin on disco fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E10 - From Port To Port'. This trip, Guy Fieri goes from Portsmouth to Portland looking for top flavours! He checks out octopus, classic biscuits and gravy, and pork belly tacos.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Cajun Country'. Andrew Zimmern digs into Cajun Country's staple dishes inspired by the area's French-speaking ancestors, including peppery boudin sausage and cayenne-spiked crawfish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Nashville'. Andrew explores the country classics of Nashville, from hot chicken to chess pie. Other mainstays range from heaven-sent biscuits smothered in gravy to juicy barbecue.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S20/E9 - Legacy On The Line'. Robert Irvine heads to Shreveport, Louisiana, to save Eddie's Restaurant, a seafood spot and a family legacy at risk of being run into the ground.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Alex vs Chocolate'. Three chocolatiers from Tennessee, Florida and California enter the arena to take on chef Alex Guarnaschelli in a competition for dessert domination.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S17/E12 - No-Sweat Summer Party'. Five food experts present fun facts and delicious recipes. From simple dinner ideas to the latest food trends, the hosts cover all things fun in food.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Earl Campbell's Custom Cadillac'. The crew creates a ground-up build for NFL legend Earl Campbell's 1949 Cadillac. Plus, a 1940 F-100 build snowballs into a much bigger job.

programme.title: Through The Wormhole With Morgan...
programme.desc: 'Through The Wormhole With Morgan Freeman. S4/E4 - When Does Life Begin?'. New evidence and technology reveal that inside us are traces of cells from relatives, blurring the lines between one life and another.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - The Deadline'. After a month out on the ice, one day remains in the ice-mining season. For every miner, that's one more day to prove that a season full of risks was worth the cost.

programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Earl Campbell's Custom Cadillac'. The crew creates a ground-up build for NFL legend Earl Campbell's 1949 Cadillac. Plus, a 1940 F-100 build snowballs into a much bigger job.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Classics'. Guy Fieri discovers the secret recipe of the cabrito burger at a roadside shack in Texas, before stumbling upon a Mediterranean paradise in the desert.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Death Row'. Chris taunts the Dudes for a chance to play the game - and shortly later, finds himself locked and handcuffed in an abandoned, haunted prison deep in the Canadian woods.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E40 - Noddy And The Lighthouse'. Noddy, Tessie, Lindy and the mermaids are playing volleyball on the beach when a badly aimed ball breaks the bulb of the lighthouse. Can the friends find an alternative light source?

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Olivia And The Mighty Five'. After spending an afternoon with Dad reading superhero comic books, a toy of William's goes missing. Is this the doings of some evil villain?

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E39 - Why Aardvark Has A Sticky Tongue'. One day Aardvark gets his tongue stuck in a honey log, his friends help pull, until finally his tongue comes free. From that day on his tongue was long and sticky, perfect for eating.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E40 - Why Whale Spouts'. There was a huge storm in Tinga Tinga and a massive wave picked Whale up and carried her all the way to the waterhole. Elephant has an idea to help Whale get back to the ocean.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E39 - The Case Of The Sticker Mystery'. New stickers, with a picture of a mysterious bandit, have appeared in Toyland. Clockwork Mouse begs Noddy to investigate.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E40 - The Case Of The Stolen Treasure'. The pirates are having a spring clean of their galleon, much to the annoyance of Pirate Stripes who wants to go on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - The Birthday Thief/Junior Gets A Pet'. Motato is stealing birthdays with his evil De-Birthday-Ficator, Junior befriends a young 'Buffalorange,' but Ichabeezer wants to capture the animal.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E41 - Skate Club'. Sandra insists on breaking the gender barrier of a 'boys only' skateboard race. But the race is one with a history for being incredibly dangerous.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E42 - Pinged And Ponged'. A little white lie told to his ping-pong loving grandmother forces Raffi to actually try out for the team when they make the finals.

programme.title: My Life Me

programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Crushing It'. As a Rumblehorn wreaks havoc on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup seeks the help of Stoick - who forms an unexpected bond with the rampaging beast.

programme.title: George Of The Jungle
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Lucky Pants/Ape Ruth'. A mysterious pair of underpants brings good luck, and George becomes the champion of his own game.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. The staff of a medieval-themed restaurant get an unfriendly visit from Professor Thurdigree Burns. When Wolfie's experiment goes awry.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Olivia And The Talent Show'. Moments before Olivia takes the stage at the big school talent show, her drum kit is accidentally destroyed. She thinks fast, drumming on trash cans and other items in a rousing performance.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E41 - Why Parrot Can't Keep A Secret'. There was a time when Parrot couldn't open his beak at all, then some beast dared to steal Lion's mane and Parrot saw the whole thing.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E42 - Why Bush Baby Has Big Eyes'. Strange things start happening and there are rumours that Majitu the Great Giant has returned. Bush Baby doesn't believe it, but then she sees the Giant and her eyes grow big.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E41 - The Case Of The Moving Train Tracks'. Queen Sparklewings is having a fairy picnic in Fable Forest that evening. Everyone offers to help set up for the picnic but Queen Sparklewings tells them not to worry.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Cool As A Cucumber/Rich Young Comic Ruler'. Larry gets sunglasses and an attitude, after Jimmy and Jerry Gourd says he's not cool, Larry figures out how to get every comic book ever made.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E45 - Liam And The Kid's Big Day Out'. When Liam announces he's babysitting Bubba Johnson, Sandra bets he won't last the day. Liam accepts the bet, adding that if he wins, she has to go to the movies with him.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E46 - Cut Out The Sarcasm'. Sandra takes up the challenge to quit being sarcastic for an entire week. But the bet doesn't get really interesting until each of the podmates takes up a challenge.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E48 - Just Say Nooo'. Raffi, in a fit of people pleasing, becomes the 'go to guy' for everyone one who needs a favour on the same day.

programme.title: 3-2-1 Penguins!
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. When the giant moon of planet Tell-A-Lie is plummeting toward earth, Jason and the Penguins must sort through the lies and figure out what is causing the malfunction.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Big Balloons'. Pat is asked to deliver helium balloons to celebrate the re-opening of Pencaster Town Hall. The kids are being given balloons to release into the sky.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - A Bouncy Castle'. Pat's mission is to deliver a bouncy castle to Lauren's class. The castle is impossible to deliver as it inflates inside the post office.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S2/E39 - Mad-Dog McSneer/Our Boy Wolfie'. The students have to do a presentation on the Underworld. A misunderstanding leads Jimmy's parents to believe that their son has turned into a werewolf.

programme.title: Home: Adventures With Tip And Oh!
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - The Cloud/Booverty'. Tip goes overboard while using Oh's storage cloud to declutter her room, Tip helps Oh prepare for his life-changing, dance-heavy Booverty ceremony.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Fomo-Opup / Lost In The Woods'. Guy Diamond enlists the help of the Snack Pack to hunt down Nova Swift's next pop-up party. Lost in Troll Forest, Poppy and Archer must learn to trust each other.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Research And Development'. With Baby Corp's stinkless serum falling in the hands of the enemy, Turtleneck Superstar CEO Baby challenges the team to create a new formula.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business

programme.title: Turbo Fast
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Packet Racket, The/Smack Me Down'. Turbo and Shadow go undercover to expose some shady bugs selling artificial ketchup, Turbo prepares to compete in an underground smack-talk contest.

programme.title: Dragons - Race To The Edge
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Big Man On Berk'. Thinking he's allergic to Meatlug, Fishlegs gets hypnotised and wakes up transformed into an invincible warrior known as Thor Bonecrusher.

programme.desc: 'S12/E40 of 37'. Die fietsryer Marc Pritzen en sang duo RNK is ons gaste.

programme.title: In Die Ysterhand Se Greep
programme.desc: 'S2/E30'. Nur is ontsteld oor koerantberigte oor haar en Yigit se egskeiding. Iclal plaas druk op Yigit om met haar te trou ter wille van Mert en die ongebore baba.

programme.title: In Die Ysterhand Se Greep
programme.desc: 'S2/E31'. Nur is woedend wanneer sy aanneem dat Yigit en Iclal die bekendstelling as 'n paartjie bywoon. Iclal sê reguit vir Nur dat sy nie sal rus totdat Yigit aan haar behoort nie.

programme.title: In Die Ysterhand Se Greep
programme.desc: 'S2/E32'. Aytul kry 'n hartspasma na sy uitvind van Iclal en Firat se baba en word na die hospitaal gehaas is. Yigit kry snuf in die neus en eis antwoorde.

programme.title: In Die Ysterhand Se Greep
programme.desc: 'S2/E33'. Iclal gebruik haar ongebore baba as hefboom om Aytul aan haar kant te kry, maar Aytul wil niks weet nie. Sy dring daarop aan dat Iclal 'n aborsie kry.

programme.title: Kind Van Die Noodlot
programme.desc: 'S1/E77 of 69'. Meryem is ontsteld wanneer Kahraman Elif huis toe bring. Yakup skarrel om geld bymekaar te maak om 'n joernalis van Kahraman weg te hou.

programme.title: Kind Van Die Noodlot
programme.desc: 'S1/E79 of 69'. Elif is in 'n kritieke toestand en gaan in vroeë kraam. 'n Gesonde seuntjie, Toprak, word gebore. Meryem wil nie meer in dieselfde huis woon as Kahraman en Elif nie.

programme.title: Kind Van Die Noodlot
programme.desc: 'S1/E80 of 69'. Kahraman en Elif is in ekstase na die geboorte van hul seun. Maksut word uit die tronk vrygelaat. Defne betaal 'n sluipmoordenaar om Elif dood te maak.

programme.title: Toks & Tjops
programme.desc: 'S12/E40 of 37'. Die fietsryer Marc Pritzen en sang duo RNK is ons gaste.

programme.title: Roer
programme.desc: 'S14/E8'. Die aktrise Kay Smith het onlangs haar karakter in Arendsvlei gegroet, maar is vandag hier om saam te bak en te gesels oor alles wat nog vir haar voorlê.

programme.title: eNuus
programme.desc: 'S13/E233 of 306'. Daaglikse nuushooftrekke, sporthoogtepunte en weervooruitskouing in Afrikaans.

programme.title: Sê Jou Sê
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Almal onthou die Station Strangler - 22 seuns is vermoor. Die man wat sit, kan net met een se dood verbind word. Is die regte man tronk toe?

programme.title: Die Boekklub
programme.desc: 'S3/E5'. Die boekklub hou konsert wat uitloop op 'n amperse fiasko. Tom en Sofia neem 'n besluit wat die hele gemeenskap raak. John en Julia is mal verlief wat lei tot probleme met Sofia.

programme.title: Op My Eish!
programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. Francois neem die dames op 'n watersport aktiwiteit wat van hulle nogal op hulle senuwees het. Daar is glad nie 'n te kort aan intieme oomblikke nie!

programme.title: KLOP!
programme.desc: 'S5/E20'. Ons eet hamburgers by The Kitchen of Oz en die skaapskeerder Frans Mackay vertel ons van sy werk. Die komediant Jason Goliath kuier op die KLOP! couch.

programme.title: Leef Jou Reis
programme.desc: 'S11/E7'. Die Altaarstukke van Gent is sekerlik een van die wêreld se bekendste kunswerke dat dit selfs die fliek 'The Monuments Men' sou inspireer. Ons wys jou Gent soos nog nooit tevore.

programme.title: Elders
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 of 13'. Erns stap van Louvain saam met die navorser Hazel Jonker en eet lekker roosterkoek saam met Frederick Marais, stigter van die Pelgrimstog van Hoop. Hy vorder tot by die kerk op Klipdrift.

programme.title: Binnelanders

programme.title: Fraksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 of 17'. Tim sukkel om sy pa te vertrou. Henk ontdek 'n fout in QPI wat katastrofies kan wees. Schalk reël 'n partytjie om almal op te beur. Jana vertel vir Schalk 'n geheim.

programme.title: Die Groenste Vingers
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 of 13'. Drie bloemiste moet werk met proteas en 'n troue uitdaging. Net twee bloemiste kan deurdring na die volgende rondte.

programme.title: Oppiestoep

programme.title: Kerkorrel: 20 Jaar Later
programme.desc: Hierdie film kyk na wat Johannes Kerkorrel gemaak het, wie hy was, sy impak op die kultuurwêreld en waarom mense twee dekades na sy dood steeds huldeblyke lewer.

programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Ted
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg's best friend is a living, breathing and foul-mouthed teddy bear in this very adult comedy that was nominated for an Academy Award.

programme.title: The Night Before
programme.desc: Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Seth Rogen and Anthony Mackie make up a hazardous trio of friends that turn Christmas on its head, in this heartfelt, chaos filled comedy.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: A man has found his perfect woman, but she has short-term memory loss and can't remember him for more than a day. He does what a man in love does: he tries to win her affection every day.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: An enjoyable romantic film. After returning home, a jobless reality TV host is tricked into running the town's Valentine's Day festival auction with her ex-fiancé.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: With a star-studded voice cast, this animation is about a journey of bravery and unexpected friendship as a dragon, a boy, and a mountain spirit look for a haven for dragons.

programme.title: Monster Family
programme.desc: Charming animated comedy. An unhappy family plan a fun night out, but everything backfires when an evil witch curses them and they all turn into monsters.

programme.title: Emily And The Magical Journey
programme.desc: A fantasy adventure full of colour and imagination. A young girl trying to cheer up her grieving mother is transported to a magical place where she faces her worst fear.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: The gang return for a musically-charged sequel. Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Naked Singularity
programme.desc: A book-inspired legal drama with sci-fi and heist themes. Frustrated with the justice system, a New York City public defender is pulled into a high-stakes heist to beat the system.

programme.title: Die In A Gunfight
programme.desc: Fists and bullets fly in this modern-day Romeo and Juliet love story. When youngsters of two feuding families fall in love, violence erupts around them. Will their love win?

programme.title: Family Squares
programme.desc: In this all-star family drama, the long-buried secrets of an estranged family are revealed when they gather via Zoom following the death of their matriarch.

programme.title: Pressure Point
programme.desc: Michael Shannon cracks the whip in this inspiring sports drama. An army veteran is brought in to help transform a dysfunctional rowing team and unlock their true potential.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend Of The Seven Seas
programme.desc: Brad Pitt and Catherine Zeta-Jones star in this animation. The legendary Sinbad embarks on a dangerous journey. He must clear his name after being framed by the goddess Eris.

programme.title: RV
programme.desc: Director Barry Sonnenfeld ('Men In Black') unleashes Robin Williams' comedic genius in this family road trip movie about a dysfunctional family trying to bond in an RV.

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants takes leave from the town of Bikini Bottom in order to track down King Neptune's stolen crown.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: The all-star cast returns for another prehistoric adventure. This time the Croods are challenged by a rival family the Bettermans, who claim to be better and more evolved.

programme.title: Pinocchio A True Story
programme.desc: This animated film reinvents the classic tale. Pinocchio joins a travelling circus to see the world, where he falls in love with gymnast Bella and wishes to be human.

programme.desc: 'Videogame Nation - The Order: 1886'. Steampunk third-person shooter The Order: 1886 is the top billing this time, and Dan, John and Aoife take a look at some of the new gaming franchises of 2015.

programme.title: Kindred
programme.desc: An unsettling psychological thriller. When Charlotte is taken in by her boyfriend's family after his death, she soon suspects that they are only after her unborn child.

programme.title: His Killer Fan
programme.desc: Jealousy is at the heart of this thriller, in which a young woman devises a devious plan when her best friend develops a romance with a rising musician.

programme.title: Assailant
programme.desc: A thriller about a couple who go to the Caribbean to save their marriage, but when the husband gets into a bar fight, they are entangled in a deadly cat-and-mouse game.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed And Delivered 3...
programme.desc: 'Signed, Sealed And Delivered 3: Second Chances'. The elite team of lost-mail detectives is on their next adventure of delivering letters and packages from the past.

programme.title: Sweet Revenge: A Hannah Swensen...
programme.desc: 'Sweet Revenge: A Hannah Swensen Mystery'. In this instalment of the Hannah Swensen mystery franchise, Hannah and Mike must plan their wedding while also solving a murder.

programme.title: The Escape Of Prisoner 614
programme.desc: This comedic modern-day Western stars Ron Perlman. In the hopes of regaining their jobs, two inept deputies attempt to track down an escaped prisoner.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds
programme.desc: Oscar winning director Steven Spielberg and blockbuster actor, Tom Cruise bring H.G. Wells' story to life in this remake of an alien invasion of Earth.

programme.title: The Man In The Iron Mask
programme.desc: A swashbuckling adventure about twin brothers separated at birth, one becomes a debauched king, the other is imprisoned, and three Musketeers are determined to put matters right.

programme.title: The Last Victim
programme.desc: In this Neo-Western thriller, a sheriff seeks a group of outlaws after a horrifying crime. When a married couple crosses their path, everything spirals into violence and revenge.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A notorious group of criminals find themselves up against a hardened detective when they attempt to pull off one last heist.

programme.title: Escape Plan: The Extractors
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone returns for another action-packed film. After Ray Breslin is hired to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a tech mogul, Breslin's girlfriend is also captured.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: Revenge is on the cards in this high-octane sequel to the hit film. After they're framed and the team is terminated, the surviving members must face off against a new enemy.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves fights for his life in this third instalment. After killing a member of the international assassin's guild, John Wick is on the run from every assassin in the world.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Tom Hardy and Woody Harrelson face off in this thrilling sequel. After Eddie interviews the serial killer, Cletus Kasady, Kasady becomes the host of the deadly symbiote Carnage.

programme.title: A Small Fortune
programme.desc: A gritty crime thriller. A desperate man living in a small village finds a large stash of money and decides to keep it, but his decision quickly turns deadly.

programme.title: 97 Minutes
programme.desc: This suspenseful thriller starring Alec Baldwin and Jonathan Rhys Meyers revolves around a hijacked 767 that will crash in 97 minutes when its fuel runs out.

programme.title: Rising Wolf
programme.desc: A tense thriller about a young woman who is kidnapped and trapped in a high-speed elevator. With her life at stake, she is pushed to the limit and begins to realise her abilities.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: Murder...
programme.desc: 'Morning Show Mysteries: Murder Ever After'. After finding bones in the basement of an old friend's house, Billie Blessings works with the new Head of Homicide to solve the case.

programme.title: After Earth

programme.title: Born A Champion

programme.title: Munki and Trunk
programme.desc: 'S1/E52 - Ostrich Opera'. Trunk tries to put Baby Ostrich to sleep by singing a lullaby. Big mistake! Baby discovers singing, and she takes to it enthusiastically, but her voice is terrible and she ruins the peace of the jungle.

programme.title: Munki and Trunk
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Queen Of The Swingers'. Munki and Trunk spot some delicious fruit in the distance, and run off through the jungle to get it. The journey's easy for Munki because he can swing from vines, but Trunk has a much harder time.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer
programme.desc: 'S6/E10 - Dora's Dance Recital'. Dora's in a Ballet Adventure! She's in a dance show & performing for her family. She just needs her dance slippers, but the Delivery Duck delivers scuba flippers instead. Oh no!

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Surfin' the Cave, Top Wing Rescues the Lemon Shack'. A falling tree threatens Shirley's home. The Cadets invite her to sleep over./ Betty McBat challenges Rod to see who's faster.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Pups Save A High Flying Skye/Pups Go For The Gold'. Uncle Otis is hurling down Jake's Mountain in a runaway mine car! Ryder and the Pups need to rescue him before it crashes.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Mission PAW: Quest for the Crown'. Chase and the team are called to Barkingburg to keep an eye on the crown.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Mysterions'. Theodore discovers Alvin and Simon have a secret club. // Dave promises to take Alvin to a water park if he gets a good grade on a test, but a crow steals it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Sing Like A Canary'. Alvin accuses Simon of being too safe. // A cute singing bird replaces Alvin in the band after Alvin makes too many demands as a performer.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Pirates Life'. When pirates show up, the boys protect a treasure chest that arrived for Dave. // The Chipmunks and Chipettes compete to set a world record to win a virtual reality game.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Arr In The Family/Finders Weepers'. Ronnie Anne is determined to help CJ get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. // Ronnie and Sid have to decide whether they 'borrow' money from a lost coin purse they found in the mercado.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S11/E217 - Spot Returns / The Check-Up'. When his pet amoeba Spot has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another plot./ Mr. Krabs is scared to get his physical, but risks the Krusty Krab being shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S11/E218 - Spin the Bottle / There's a Sponge in My Soup'. Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie to get the secret formula./ Mr. Krabs' new soup is a hit, until some heat-loving hippies move into the soup vat!

programme.title: Middlemost Post
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Premium Parker/Toast Of The Town'. Parker makes some bougie new friends while the Middlemost Post is on vacation./ Angus and Parker compete in a toast-making contest.

programme.title: Middlemost Post
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Ariel Force One/Itsy Bitsy'. A hot air balloonist crash lands into the Steadfast./ When Parker shelters a spider during a blizzard, the cloud learns of Angus's spider fear.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Monster Cash'. Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their Dad's new apartment permanently. // Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy'.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Trend Game/This Bird Has Flown'. When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. // Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S5/E98 - What Ever Happened To SpongeBob?'. When SpongeBob tries to spend some quality time with his friends, he just ends up being a nuisance. They all tell him to go away, so SpongeBob decides to do just that.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S5/E99 - The Two Faces Of Squidward/Spongehenge'. Squidward is rushed to hospital when SpongeBob accidentally slams a door on his face./ A very windy day blows air through SpongeBob's holes creating flute-like sounds.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S9/E193 - Sanctuary!/What's Eating Patrick?'. When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Cursed!'. Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him!

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Dial M. For Mustard'. After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it! // Ronnie Anne and her friends uncover a town mystery: what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart?

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Tour Bus'. Alvin talks Dave into buying a used tour bus. // Alvin signs the Chipmunks up for a game show.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Alvin Management'. Alvin accuses Dave of yelling at him too much, so a therapist moves in. // Miss Smith and Dave work together to keep an old secret when a time capsule is dug up.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Munk vs Machine/Shack Magic'. In a dodgeball tournament, no-one expects Theo to be their secret weapon. // The Chipmunks find a shack that magically fills with toys and games.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S8/E59 - A SquarePants Family Vacation'. When SpongeBob and Patrick get lost on a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef, they end up on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Prankaversary'. When Frida's fun dad comes to visit, Hector tries to win back his grandchildren's attention. // Ronnie Anne and Lincoln are set for a big day of pranks.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Grandparent Trap/Miss Step'. Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor!

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Just Be Coo'. When Sancho gets himself into trouble in the city, Sergio helps him become a model pet! // Worried that Lori may have a new crush, Bobby visits her in college and tries to impress her with his golf skills.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents
programme.desc: 'S7/E15 - Old Man And The C- / Balance Of Flour'. Dad fails miserably on a kids' game show // Timmy steals a top secret recipe for Jorgen's grandmother's delicious brownies, with predictable trouble.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents
programme.desc: 'S8/E1 - Love Triangle'. Poof and Foop compete to win the affections of Goldie Goldenglow, a magical new girl at Spellementary School while participating in the Spellementary School play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S11/E241 - Squirrel Jelly/The String'. SpongeBob and Patrick have their day of jelly fishing disturbed by Sandy's competitiveness./ SpongeBob pulls from Squidward's shirt a loose string that never seems to end.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S12/E242 - FarmerBob/Gary And Spot'. SpongeBob and Patrick work a day on Old Man Jenkins' farm, much to his dismay./ Sandy narrates the nocturnal adventures of Gary and his secret pal - Spot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S12/E243 - The Nitwitting / The Ballad Of Filthy Muck'. Patrick inducts SpongeBob into his prestigious society of dullards and doofuses./ Patrick plays around in so much trash that he becomes unrecognizable.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S12/E244 - The Krusty Slammer / Pineapple RV'. Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse after Plankton breaks the law./ SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home.

programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Munk vs Machine/Shack Magic'. In a dodgeball tournament, no-one expects Theo to be their secret weapon. // The Chipmunks find a shack that magically fills with toys and games.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks

programme.title: Corn & Peg
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Forever Home / Broken Telephone'. Corn and Peg set out to find a 'forever' home for each and every animal. // When the telephones aren't working, Corn and Peg help deliver messages for Ms Sassy.

programme.desc: 'S5/E11 - Biscuits And Gravy'. The cooks and cons incorporate berries into their biscuit and gravy dishes. Then they battle with liquorice to impress judges Aarti Sequeira and Curtis Stone.

programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Not Your Mama's Meatloaf'. The pros and amateurs create spins on meatloaf by adding citrus to the mix. Then they must infuse their dishes with jalapenos to impress the judges.

programme.desc: 'S2/E16'. Sam becomes a tutor. He also finds out the girl he's been chatting up is the beautiful girl dubbed The Unattainable.

programme.title: Violetta
programme.desc: 'S1/E52'. Violetta's love life is chaotic. She still can't choose between Tomas and Leon so Tomas gets fed up with her, and decides to concentrate his attentions on someone else instead.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Sunshine Manor'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.

programme.title: Rolling With The Ronks
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Hold Back the Night'. Mila dreams of installing electric lighting, which would allow her to observe nocturnal animals and stay up late. Mila leads everyone to believe giants cause electricity. The Ronks love it.

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Lily Pad Thai, Plantar's Last Stand'. Anne gets a job at Stumpy's, and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - The Missing Links of Moorshire!'. Scrooge and Glomgold discover a lost golf course in a mystical realm, and Scrooge can't wait to share the sport with his nephews, until he realizes Dewey may be better at it than him!

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System!'. When Mark Beaks invents an uncrashable self-driving car, threatened Launchpad recruits Gyro's eager intern Fenton to help him defeat the mechanical menace.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Jaw$!'. When Lena unleashes a magical megaladon in Scrooge's Money Bin, the ensuing shark hunt tests her loyalty to Magica and her friendship with Webby.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E59 - The Van/ Bat Girl'. Gramma and Cricket fume over an unsightly van parked in front of their house. Nancy joins Cricket and Tilly's little league team to get back at their unsportsmanlike rivals.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E60 - Gloria's Cafe/Cousin Jilly'. The Green family is back for more fun in the Big City! Cricket, Tilly, Bill and Gramma continue to go on epic journeys through the city and into the hearts of their neighbors.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Space Chicken'. Cricket tries to launch a chicken into outer space. On steak night, Cricket leaves the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Cricket Versus, Blue Tater'. Cricket must wrestle a wild animal for a rite of passage. Bill unearths a mysterious blue potato. Is it cursed?

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Swimming Fool, Tilly's Goat'. The family visits an indoor pool for the first time. Will Tilly enter the family goat in a dog show?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E80 - Lies'. A friend of Adrien's get akumatized into Lies. Able to make liars disappear, she is determined to rid the world of lies and those who tell them...including superheroes!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E82'. Mr. Ramier gets akumatized into Mr. Pigeon for the 72nd time, and now, he can turn people into evil pigeons!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E83 - Psycomedian'. A famous comedian gets akumatized into Psycomedian. Able to impose any emotions on anyone, he wants to wipe the smiles off everyone's faces.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E84 - Furious Fu'. Ladybug and Cat Noir face someone they know well...and never imagined they would have to fight someday.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E85 - Sole Crusher'. A newcomer to Marinette's circle of friends gets akumatized into Sole Crusher, a giant supervillain who can absorb people. Will Ladybug and Cat Noir be up to the task?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E86 - Queen Banana'. When Chloe gets akumatized into Queen Banana, Ladybug decides to entrust a Miraculous to a new and promising ally to help her stop the supervillain.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E87 - Gabriel Agreste'. The adventure in Paris continues for Ladybug and Cat Noir, surrounded by new allies and fighting an ever more powerful and determined opponent.

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S2/E31 - Face to Face'. Mal and Evie face off against Zevon as he uses the stolen Jewel-bilee gems to take over all of Auradon.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - The Lucky Penny / Lock, Stock, and Peril'. Molly and Scratch help Libby improve her luck on Friday the 13th. When the McGees get locked in the basement, Molly and Scratch seek help.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Out of House and Home / Home Is Where the Haunt Is'. The McGees make fast cash. Molly pretends all is ok.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Scaring Is Caring / All Night Plight'. Scratch gets a cute disease. Molly watches a comet.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Learning The Ropes
programme.desc: 'S6/E112 - Worst Aid'. Winnie plans to secretly audition for a reality stunt show, with Bill and Jake's help. Lou and Noah teach first aid to Desiny and Parker, but Destiny struggles under the pressure.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E31 - When You Wish You Were The Star'. When Miley wishes she could be Hannah all the time, her wish comes true. But despite a superstar lifestyle, including dating Jesse McCartney, she misses her normal life as Miley.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - I Am Hannah, Hear Me Croak'. Miley has a throat problem which might jeopardise her career as Hannah unless she has an operation. Her mother, played by Brooke Shields, appears in a dream to assure her everything will be alright.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - You've Gotta Fight for Your Right Not to Party'. Miley and Jackson's fighting gets them grounded, but their plan to get Lilly and Oliver to pretend to be them when they want to go out backfires.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - I Want You To Want Me...To Go To Florida'. Miley's due to perform at a charity concert in Florida, and meets a 'one hit wonder' called Michaela who says she's going to sing Miley off the stage.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - My Best Friend's Boyfriend'. Miley becomes an amateur detective when she discovers that her best friend Lilly's boyfriend is a two-timing Romeo. She's determined to catch him out.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E81 - Wrong Victor, the'. When Raven's father, Victor, has a health scare, Raven and Booker return to San Francisco to help. Booker fails to babysit his cousin and must fix things before Raven finds out.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E82 - Big Sammich, the'. Raven wants to help Victor maintain a healthy lifestyle and leads by example. Meanwhile, Booker finds a way to impress his Grandpa, but it may just undo all of Raven's hard work.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Time Out'. When Harper and Daisy get stuck in the wrong time periods, they must pretend to be each other to protect the secret of the portal and time travel.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - It's About Time'. When Sam can't get his Time Machine to work, Savannah vows to help him! Meanwhile, Griffin tells Daisy that he thinks Topher is hiding something and enlists her to find answers.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - The Science of Seb'. Esmerelda and Lacie plot to destroy the love between Sorsha and Seb, thus allowing the third Founder to take her over. They turn their dark spider into a beautiful girl. Will Seb be able to resist her?

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - The Rise of Hollowfall'. Sorsha has a Founder in her head, but her love for Seb is protecting her from becoming evil. So Esmerelda and Lacie turn their dark spider into a beautiful girl to attract Seb.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - School Break-In'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.
