programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S7/E7 - Are You Happy Now'. Series favourites give their own juicy opinions on previous episodes' drama and best moments. From the comfort of their home, no one is holding back!

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Choosing Between Life And Limb'. In Illinois, a newly engaged man mysteriously collapses and faces organ failure. His fiancé gazes in horror as he must choose between life and limb.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: 'S4/E25 - Breech Baby In The Bath Tub'. When Nicole wakes one night with terrible cramps, she is horrified to discover she is in labour. Will she and her baby survive?

programme.title: Say Yes To The Dress
programme.desc: 'S11/E18 - More, More, More!'. Rasha needs a huge ball gown that will wow all 700 guests at her wedding. Plus, Melissa's dad has a special surprise for her when she wants more bling.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S4/E12 - Change Of Heart'. Is it all over for Colt and Larissa? Ashley's health issues change everything, while Andrei and Elizabeth's father face off. And, Nicole tells her mum the truth.

programme.title: Outdaughtered
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - Kindergarten Quints'. As the Busbys' RV adventure continues, a storm threatens to ruin the fun. With kindergarten looming, the family face tough decisions that may upset the girls.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: 'S4/E21 - Gas & Go Baby'. Extreme pain and cramping forces Christie to leave work and head to A&E with her mother. But before they arrive, they make a shocking realisation.

programme.title: Long Island Medium
programme.desc: 'S7/E8 - I Now Pronounce You...'. Theresa is asked to officiate a wedding for two people who met at one of her group readings. Plus she surprises a woman on Wall Street with a reading.

programme.title: So Freakin Cheap
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Saving For A Rainy Day'. The Watsons get cheap engagement photos, and Ashley and Colby try to conceive. Becky Guiles looks for cheap ways to tear down a wall.

programme.title: Doubling Down With The Derricos
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Triple Jeopardy'. Karen comes home to greet her children after being in the maternity ward for over five weeks. Plus, De'Aren and Dyver's are cleared to leave the NICU.

programme.title: Doubling Down With The Derricos
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Home For The Holidays?'. Deon and Karen are hit hard by the reality of Dawsyn's extra care when they visit a doctor about her feeding tube. And, the search begins to find a nanny.

programme.title: Doubling Down With The Derricos
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Divide And Conquer'. Dawsyn's next big surgery is imminent and tensions are running high. Plus, GG picks the worst possible moment to talk to Deon and Karen.

programme.title: Doubling Down With The Derricos
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - For The Love Of Dawsyn'. The stakes are higher than ever as Dawsyn heads into hospital for her final heart surgery. Plus, Darian drops a bomb that no one is prepared for.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S7/E7 - Are You Happy Now'. Life after the 90 days continues. As the couples look back at their journey, the newlyweds realise that their lives have not become easier.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S4/E13 - Colt And Larissa: Judgement Day + Tell All Part 1'. What will be the outcome of Larissa's trial? Plus, the couples and Shaun Robinson meet to discuss intense moments from this season.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: 'S8/E15 - Seasons Greetings And Saintly Surprises'. It's Christmas and the Valastros throw their annual party to give back to their community, so Buddy creates a magical Christmas tree cake.

programme.title: Kitchen Boss

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant

programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Five Generations Of Teen Parents'. Chloe struggles to balance school with motherhood. Meanwhile, Tyra fears she's losing her friends, and McKayla and Caelan have a huge argument.

programme.title: Long Island Medium

programme.title: The Bad Skin Clinic
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Dr. Emma sees Olivia, 11, who develops skin cancers when exposed to UV light. Plus, toddler Millie's eczema is having a devastating effect on the family.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing

programme.title: Extreme Couponing
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Joni & Angelique'. In Ohio, Joni tries to get $3,100 worth of groceries for less than $100. Meanwhile, in Washington State, Angelique stays up all night planning for her shopping trip.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Rick And Karissa/Torski'. Karissa and husband Rick are the world's cheapest couple. Their planning extends even in to their death, arranging a budget funeral - for themselves.

programme.title: The Matrix
programme.desc: A computer hacker joins forces with rebel warriors to battle a malevolent cyberintelligence.

programme.title: Anaconda 3: The Offspring
programme.desc: Two genetically-altered 60-foot anaconda snakes escape their lab.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: 'S11/E9 - Devil's Triangle'. Steve and Amy travel to Pittsburgh to investigate paranormal activity in a tattoo parlour where the artists and customers fear for their safety.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - The Earth Next Door'. Astronomers detect a potentially habitable planet tantalizingly close to Earth. A chance discovery at NASA reveals a top secret military space program.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Ancient Astronauts'. Did aliens help build the Pyramids? Or does the 'ancient astronauts' idea go back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenge religion and science?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E2 - Ancient Visitors'. Josh is on Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe aliens visited millennia ago. And, he goes meteorite hunting in Zimbabwe.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Mummy Curse And Nazi Art Hoax'. Don Wildman investigates a deadly pharaoh's curse. Plus, he reveals the truth behind a secret operation to sell phony art to the Nazis.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Mastodon Murder And Cleopatra'. Don Wildman recounts a tale of money, mastodons and murder. He also reveals how a priceless ancient Egyptian artifact was almost lost at sea.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - UFO Recovery'. Chuck receives a map supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on an epic treasure to find them.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - There's No Place Like Storo'. The miners have their first target on Storø. Finding accessible targets within close distance to the camp is crucial for the success of the expedition.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Ancient Astronauts'. Did aliens help build the Pyramids? Or does the 'ancient astronauts' idea go back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenge religion and science?

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Social Clusters'. An ongoing series of UFO sightings off the Southern California coastline leads Chuck and the team to examine the link between UFOs, the military and the ocean.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E2 - Ancient Visitors'. Josh is on Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe aliens visited millennia ago. And, he goes meteorite hunting in Zimbabwe.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - American Nazis'. From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorised the USA in the 1930s.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E1 - Close Encounters'. Josh Gates starts his extra-terrestrial search with a visit to NASA and an alien-hunting expedition in Chile, where scientists make new discoveries.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Skull Of Doom And Dracula'. Don Wildman investigates a UFO crash in the heart of the Wild West. Plus, he reveals the true story behind the world's most notorious vampire.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - Lady Godiva'. Don Wildman treks to the UK to visit a statue honouring bare-cheeked bravery. He also visits a Brooklyn cemetery to investigate the death of a psychic.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Fractured'. High on his discovery with the Feldman's at the now named 'Americo Creek,' Americo reports back to the team at the miners meeting that he found 12 flakes of gold.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Founding Fathers'. Discovers which of America's founding fathers used sex as an instrument of diplomacy and which one secretly scoffed at the divinity of Jesus.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Arizona Anomalies'. A recent UFO sighting in Phoenix leads Chuck and the team to Sedona, AZ. They explore whether the area's energy vortexes act as portals for otherworldly visitors.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E3 - UFOs Over England'. In Zimbabwe Josh interviews witnesses to one of the largest ever UFO sightings. Then, in England, he examines a case known as 'Europe's Roswell.'

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Curse Of The Full Moon'. Two cosmonauts fight for their lives, trapped inside a capsule in a frozen lake. NASA astronomers are spooked when the full moon affects their experiments.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Monsters Of The Deep'. Paul Beban searches for the truth about sea monsters. He travels to Vermont's Lake Champlain to see if an unclassified creature lurks in its dark depths.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Lizzie Borden And Bigfoot'. Don Wildman investigates the greatest unsolved murder in American history. Plus, he reveals a crucial piece of evidence in the hunt for Bigfoot.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Silent Fear'. Paranormal investigators Amy Bruni and Adam Berry and psychic medium Chip Coffey help a family who are being haunted by a demented creature.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Curse Of The Full Moon'. Two cosmonauts fight for their lives, trapped inside a capsule in a frozen lake. NASA astronomers are spooked when the full moon affects their experiments.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Founding Fathers'. Discovers which of America's founding fathers used sex as an instrument of diplomacy and which one secretly scoffed at the divinity of Jesus.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E3 - UFOs Over England'. In Zimbabwe Josh interviews witnesses to one of the largest ever UFO sightings. Then, in England, he examines a case known as 'Europe's Roswell.'

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Royal Baccarat Scandal, Soleste And Moroello, Franz Ferdinand'. An illegal card game at a British manor leads to a scandal that threatens a prince, and the murder of an Austrian castle's owner sparks a global disaster.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Lizzie Borden And Bigfoot'. Don Wildman investigates the greatest unsolved murder in American history. Plus, he reveals a crucial piece of evidence in the hunt for Bigfoot.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Mastodon Murder And Cleopatra'. Don Wildman recounts a tale of money, mastodons and murder. He also reveals how a priceless ancient Egyptian artifact was almost lost at sea.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - Lady Godiva'. Don Wildman treks to the UK to visit a statue honouring bare-cheeked bravery. He also visits a Brooklyn cemetery to investigate the death of a psychic.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Murder On The Prairie'. A series of strange animal deaths and UFO sightings brings Chuck to Colorado. Reports of authorities ignoring these incidents suggest a government cover-up.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - UFO Recovery'. Chuck receives a map supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on an epic treasure to find them.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Legend Of The Skinwalker'. A recent creature sighting outside the infamous Skinwalker Ranch brings Chuck and the team to Utah to investigate. Evidence indicates it might be an alien.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Social Clusters'. An ongoing series of UFO sightings off the Southern California coastline leads Chuck and the team to examine the link between UFOs, the military and the ocean.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Arizona Anomalies'. A recent UFO sighting in Phoenix leads Chuck and the team to Sedona, AZ. They explore whether the area's energy vortexes act as portals for otherworldly visitors.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: 'S9/E7 - Not for Beginners'. Time is running out for the builders to complete their projects. Chris Maynard gets help installing solar panels and sets up cameras to watch for bears.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: 'S9/E8 - Look What They've Done'. Josh and his team fight the rain and wind to install the wood stove and Chris Maynard and his wife rush to install the kitchen counters and furniture.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - David And Goliath'. In the summer, the massive ice sheet melts on Greenland, revealing immense mineral wealth in the virgin rock for a group of eight American prospectors.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - There's No Place Like Storo'. The miners have their first target on Storø. Finding accessible targets within close distance to the camp is crucial for the success of the expedition.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Fractured'. High on his discovery with the Feldman's at the now named 'Americo Creek,' Americo reports back to the team at the miners meeting that he found 12 flakes of gold.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Mothman'. A team of researchers seeks answers to mysteries surrounded the Mothman. They explore theories that the legendary cryptid is an abnormality in the evolutionary chain.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Missing Douglas'. Experts examine whether an interdimensional portal in the Alaska Triangle led to the disappearance of an aeroplane carrying 44 military personnel in 1950.

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Bobby Mackey's Music World'. Jack Osbourne and Katrina Weidman travel to Wilder, Kentucky, to visit a honky-tonk. It is considered by many to be the most haunted place on earth.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Monsters Of The Deep'. Paul Beban searches for the truth about sea monsters. He travels to Vermont's Lake Champlain to see if an unclassified creature lurks in its dark depths.

programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Dr. Elna gee insig in hormonale behandeling vir polisistiese ovariumsindroom en hoe dit jou sekslewe kan affekteer. 'n Vrou kla oor haar man wat nie die eerste stap neem wanneer dit by seks kom nie.

programme.title: Wys My 'n Huis
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. In hierdie episode is getroude paartjie Georgia en Toyce op soek na 'n stukkie hemel in Sable Hills. Maar eiendomsagent Cara het haar hande vol om met hul versoeke en uiteenlopende smake by te hou.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Die aanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels vat dinge vas in Randfontein. Hulle help vir Roxy van Heerden dat haar slaapkamer haar persoonlikheid weerspieël.

programme.title: Dr. Nou
programme.desc: 'S4/E2'. Met 'n jong gees en baie lus vir die lewe voel Chris dat hy op die ouderdom van 60 nie lyk soos wat hy voel nie. Hy roep die hulp van die dokters van Dr. Nou in om hom te help om sy innerlike na vore te bring.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E6'. Alan en Frances Webster het 30 jaar gelede met skaars 20 koeie naby Weenen in KZN begin melk. Vandag is daar meer as 1 200 koeie in produksie en dié egpaar woeker moedig voort.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E2'. Boer Jaco Minnaar van die Hennenman distrik vertel vir Lynette Francis-Puren wat dit verg om die regte besluite op die regte tye te neem, veral wanneer dit kom by beleggings in tegnologie en meganisasie.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Privaatspeurder Wendy Pascoe is op die spoor van CJ de Villiers, 'n swendelaar wat in die boubedryf werk en kliënte se geld steel.

programme.title: Agter Tralies
programme.desc: 'S4/E12'. David word as kind geboelie omdat hy nie vir homself kan opstaan nie, en word dan self 'n boelie om homself te verdedig. Baie lewens word verwoes in die proses.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Energiesake kom dié week onder die loep. Lynette Francis-Puren kuier by Koos Blanckenberg in die Swartland om te hoor hoe hulle oplossings inspan, hand-aan-hand met die natuur, om energie meer doeltreffend te gebruik.

programme.title: Slim Vang Sy Baas
programme.desc: 'S6/E1'. Die twee spanne trio's, Die Sibbe en Smile FM, spook dit uit teen mekaar in algemene kennis en nostalgiese speletjies om te sien wie moontlik kan wegstap met R10 000.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E5'. Andrew Morphew het oor drie jaar sy familie se suiwelboerdery by Howick in KZN na organiese produksie omgeskakel. Organiese melk moet aan baie vereistes voldoen, wat deurgaans nuwe uitdagings bied.

programme.title: Musiekpaniek
programme.desc: 'S8/E7'. Skop jou skoene uit, want vanaand kuier 'kaalvoet kind' Ruan Josh op die stel van Musiekpaniek. Hy en Carla Mackenzie toets vier van sy aanhangers se kennis van musiek.

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Dis dag vier en die vroue herstel steeds van die vorige aand se skemerkelkie-drama. Die emosies is rou, maar dis tyd vir 'n nuwe uitdaging: Die vroue moet wys hoe goed hulle kan 'multitask'. Sal iemand vir Chanté kan ontsetel?

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai: Familie En Vriende
programme.desc: 'S2/E12'. Ons gunstelingtydverdryf is nou 'n sosiale eksperiment. Drie paartjies wat mekaar nie ken nie, braai by mekaar en heelwat gebeur om die vuur. En ons praat nie net van die lekker kos nie!

programme.title: Die Bruid-boetiek
programme.desc: 'S3/E9'. Diaan soek 'n trourok vir 'n goeie vriendin. Chantel-Lee moet voorkom dat 'n Griekse troue in 'n tragedie ontaard en Diaan maak 'n trourok vir 'n bruid wat verlief geraak het op een van sy TV-skeppings.
